name: Offroad Bus Driving Game: Lite Edition

reviews.review_title: Worst bus driving game I've ever played
reviews.review_description: The pictures are nothing like the game false advertisement

reviews.review_title: Everything about this game is terrible
reviews.review_description: Graphics are nothing alike in included pictures, game looks like bad Roblox game that was made in under 2 days. Steering is terrible, there isn't any opinion to drive in reverse or even brake. You can only drive forward, start "engine" of your bus using big red button and adjust sit height using another 2 big buttons and rotate wheel. Driving physics are unrealistic and unpleasant to drive. There are other cars but for hitting them you lose and have to start level again (there are around 13 bad copy paste levels). You just drive avoiding cars that appear sometimes and are slow, you go through checkpoints and then to finish. I would estimate that tracks are around 1km (short and boring). Their design is ugly, copypaste, unrealistic and boring. All textures are ugly and don't match each other, with destroys whole esthetics or game. All models are low quality and have terrible textures. Menus are bad designed and look like they were made in scratch by 11yo. There is like one track of music and sound effects are terrible. This game would be worth at most 3 cents, 3 dollars is absurd for game like that.

Best Bus Driving Experience in VR!
Feel like a real bus driver! The offroad driving is thrilling, realistic, and challenging. A must-play for anyone who loves bus sims and VR adventures!

Best Game in very low price, 
i love driving bus on off-road track, and the traffic make it more interesting and engaging.
best controls and best experience
The inside is terrible false advertising
